title: Cold War
writer: Pawel Pawlikowski, Janusz Glowacki, Piotr Borkowski
actors: Joanna Kulig, Tomasz Kot, Borys Szyc
plot: In the 1950s, a music director falls in love with a singer and tries to persuade her to flee communist Poland for France.
language: Polish, French, Croatian, German, Russian, Serbian, Italian
country: Poland, United Kingdom, France, Belgium, India
awards: Nominated for 3 Oscars. 52 wins & 126 nominations total
